codeReview.summary: The fix updates tool_result handling to map isError to toolStatus in both the update and push branches, adds regression coverage for the error case, and declares the missing @craft-agent/shared dependency for mobile-tokens. These changes directly address the prior blocking issue without introducing new regressions.

summary: Reviewed commit b1dba89 for fix-event-processor-tool-error. The tool_result error mapping and regression test cover the previously failing behavior, and the mobile-tokens dependency is now explicit. No issues found.
